title: Team Config
description: FR-VID-12 §4 Stage 7 — Structured multi-agent dispatch definition. Teams use selective or parallel dispatch with an orchestrator that merges results. Agents exchange structured packets, not implicit conversational state.

description.description: Human-readable description of the team's purpose.

execution_shape.description: Execution shape — team means selective or parallel dispatch with orchestrator merge.

agent_id.description: Reference to a DEP-RUN-002 agent contract ID.

role.description: The agent's role within this team.

optional.description: Whether this agent can be skipped if unavailable.

orchestrator.description: Agent ID of the orchestrator responsible for dispatching tasks and merging results.

packet_types.description: Structured packet types exchanged between agents in this team.

merge_strategy.description: How the orchestrator merges results from team agents.
